response.reasoning: Candidate has 13+ years of software development experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Strong full-stack background with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB at Optilyz directly matches the primary stack. Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, which aligns with the AI agent development requirement. TDD/craftsmanship culture from RIDE Capital and Altom aligns with testing framework expectations. Gaps: no explicit Nest.js mention, no Kotlin experience, limited explicit cloud (AWS CDK mentioned but no GCP/Azure), no Vitest specifically (though testing background is strong). Founder of GISCollective demonstrates end-to-end ownership and Kubernetes deployment experience. Education matches (BS Computer Science). Berlin-based matches typical EU role location.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB matching primary stack
Direct AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework experience at current role
Strong TDD, code review, and software craftsmanship background across multiple roles
concerns: No explicit Nest.js framework experience listed
No Kotlin/Java backend service experience for secondary stack requirement
Limited explicit cloud platform breadth (AWS CDK only; no GCP/Azure/Kubernetes production depth shown clearly)
response.justification: Candidate is a senior full-stack engineer whose primary stack experience (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) closely matches the role, with directly relevant AI-agent and MCP work at the current employer. Missing Nest.js and Kotlin are real gaps but learnable given the depth of polyglot experience (D, Java, C++, Python-adjacent work). Strong testing/craftsmanship culture and architecture exposure make this a solid interview candidate.
